title: E1 - Indoor ambient temperature sensor fault
summary: Fault code E1 indicates indoor ambient temperature sensor open or short circuit for more than 2 minutes.

structured_payload.cause: Sensor open or short circuit for more than 2 minutes

evidence_quote: E1 室内环温传感器故障  传感器断、短连续 2min以上

title: E2 - Indoor coil temperature sensor fault
summary: Fault code E2 indicates indoor coil temperature sensor open or short circuit for more than 2 minutes.

structured_payload.cause: Sensor open or short circuit for more than 2 minutes

evidence_quote: E2 室内管温传感器故障  传感器断、短连续 2min以上

title: E3 - Outdoor ambient temperature sensor fault
summary: Fault code E3 indicates outdoor ambient temperature sensor open or short circuit for more than 2 minutes.

structured_payload.cause: Sensor open or short circuit for more than 2 minutes

evidence_quote: E3 室外环温传感器故障  传感器断、短连续 2min以上

title: E4 - Outdoor coil or discharge temperature sensor fault
summary: Fault code E4 indicates outdoor coil sensor fault or discharge temperature sensor fault, triggered by sensor open/short for 2 minutes or discharge temperature exceeding 120°C 3 times in 30 minutes.

structured_payload.description: Outdoor coil temperature sensor fault or discharge temperature sensor fault
structured_payload.cause: Sensor open or short circuit for more than 2 minutes, or discharge temperature exceeds 120°C 3 times in 30 minutes

evidence_quote: E4 室外管温传感器故障或室外吐气传感器故障  传感器断、短连续2min以上或室外排气温度30分钟内连续3次超过120℃

title: E5 - Overcurrent or phase sequence fault
summary: Fault code E5 indicates overcurrent protection during operation or phase sequence fault at initial power-up.

structured_payload.description: Overcurrent fault or phase sequence fault
structured_payload.cause: Phase sequence fault if reported at initial power-up; overcurrent protection if reported during operation

evidence_quote: E5 过电流故障  初次上电便报出为相序故障。运行中报出为过电流保护

title: E6 - High or low pressure fault
summary: Fault code E6 indicates outdoor high pressure protection or low pressure protection.

structured_payload.description: Outdoor high pressure fault or low pressure fault
structured_payload.cause: High pressure protection or low pressure protection

evidence_quote:
E6 室外高压压力故障  室外高压压力过高保护
室外低压压力故障  室外低压压力过低保护或排气过高保护

title: E7 - Temperature cutoff protection
summary: Fault code E7 indicates system fault where cooling or heating function is abnormal.

structured_payload.cause: System fault; cooling or heating function abnormal

evidence_quote: E7 温度截止保护  系统故障。系统制冷或制热功能失常。

title: E8 - Panel or wired controller communication fault
summary: Fault code E8 indicates communication fault between panel/wired controller and indoor board for more than 4 minutes.

structured_payload.description: Panel or wired controller communication fault
structured_payload.cause: Communication abnormal for more than 4 minutes

evidence_quote: E8 面板或线控器与室内板通信故障 通讯不正常连续 4min以上

title: E9 - Indoor/outdoor communication fault
summary: Fault code E9 indicates communication fault between indoor and outdoor boards for more than 4 minutes.

structured_payload.cause: Communication disconnected for more than 4 minutes

evidence_quote: E9 室内、外通讯故障  室内、外电脑板通讯断开 4min以上

title: Indoor fan speeds
summary: Indoor fan speeds: high 540±30 r/min, medium 460±30 r/min, low 380±30 r/min.

structured_payload.value: High: 540±30 r/min, Medium: 460±30 r/min, Low: 380±30 r/min

evidence_quote: 室内风机转速 高速： 540±30r/min 中速： 460±30r/min 低速： 380±30r/min
